rules_text:
Soul 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 soul mana to play this card.)[/i]
Obstruct [i](This can block attacks.)[/i]
{1}, Exert: Attack 1. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 1 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 1 endurance counter from it.)[/i]
